title: I Got Yelled At for This in Pakistan 😳
text: Do not make this mistake that I just did Pakistan. I still feel bad about it. Just happened. I was eating biryani. And these school children, they came up to me in the restaurant and they said, “Hey, can we take a photo with you?” So I followed them. I didn't realize, but I was following them into the family dining hall. Only families, women and children are allowed in there. And I was a stag. And so I entered and someone yells out, “Hey!” And I quickly realize where I was and what I'd done. And so I quickly just got out of there. I'm sure the guy would have been fine. I'm sure he would have given me the benefit of the doubt. But I wasn't going to hang around to find out, right? So I quickly got out of there, and I realized my mistake that I shouldn't have been in there because the women were unmasked. Yeah, here in Pakistan men and women are very segregated, especially in restaurants where they'll be eating unveiled in the family area where I should not have been. If you do that by mistake. Just get out quick, okay? Did you know this was a thing?
